calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-17-2014 Vacated

Petition Pursuant To Probate Code Section 850 For Quasi-Specific Performance Of Contract To Make Trust Distribution, For Imposition Of Constructivr Tr
Off Calendar Aug-04-2014 Continued To Dec-01-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Collier for (trustee/respondent) Martha Naber. James Barringer for (Petitioner) Edward Partier.

Mr. Collier stated that much of the discovery has been done and he would like to request a trial date and anticipates the trial to last two afternoons. Mr. Barringer indicated that he would have three or four witnesses. The petition pursuant to probate code section 850 for quasi-specific performance, etc., was referred to the department of the Presiding Judge (206) to be set for trial, on December 1, 2014 (order for the same signed in open court).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy McConico. (Not Reported)

Petition Pursuant To Probate Code Section 850 For Quasi-Specific Performance Of Contract To Make Trust Distribution, For Imposition Of Constructivr Tr
Off Calendar Jun-02-2014 Continued To Aug-04-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Pursuant To Probate Code Section 850 For Quasi-Specific Performance Of Contract To Make Trust Distribution, For Imposition Of Constructivr Tr
Off Calendar Apr-21-2014 Continued To Jun-02-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Barringer for Edward Partier (Petitioner). Richard Collier for Martha Naber (Respondent/Trustee).

Mr. Barringer stated that discovery has not been completed, that they have done some document discovery and that they intend to do depositions. The Petition Pursuant to Probate Code Section 850 for Quasi-Specific Performance of Contract to Make Trust Distribution was continued to June 2, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for further status on discovery. Counsel was directed to contact the Probate Examiner if they need more time.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Malone. (Not Reported)

Petition Pursuant To Probate Code Section 850 For Quasi-Specific Performance Of Contract To Make Trust Distribution, For Imposition Of Constructivr Tr
Off Calendar Mar-14-2014 Continued To Apr-21-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Pursuant To Probate Code Section 850 For Quasi-Specific Performance Of Contract To Make Trust Distribution, For Imposition Of Constructivr Tr
Off Calendar Mar-10-2014 Continued To Apr-14-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Barringer for Edward Partier.

Mr. Barringer stated that a response was filed, that they are in the early endings of discovery, that Mr. Collier intends to take his Client's deposition soon, that he was told by Mr. Collier that they are going to fight this and that they have not discussed mediation. The Petition Pursuant to Probate Code Section 850 for Quasi-Performance, etc. was continued to April 14, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Counsel are to discuss the issue of mediation.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
